hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"tool_input\",{}).get(\"command\",\"\"))"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(rm -rf|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|git push --force.*main|git push --force.*master)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive command detected: $CMD" >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"tool_input\",{}).get(\"command\",\"\"))"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qP "^git commit(?!.*--amend)" && ! echo "$CMD" | grep -qP "\-m \"?(feat|fix|refactor|test|docs|infra|chore|ci):"; then echo "BLOCKED: Commit message must use a conventional prefix (feat:, fix:, refactor:, test:, docs:, infra:, chore:, ci:)" >&2; exit 2; fi'

python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
# Strip heredoc content (<<EOF...EOF, <<'EOF'...EOF) to avoid false positives on docs
cleaned = re.sub(r\"<<'?\\w+'?.*?\\n.*?\\nEOF\", '', cmd, flags=re.DOTALL)
# Strip single-quoted strings (safe literal text)
cleaned = re.sub(r\"'[^']*'\", '', cleaned)
SECRET_PATS = r'(\\.pem|\\.key|\\.prv|\\.pub|\\.p12|\\.pfx|\\.crt|\\.cer|id_rsa|id_ed25519|id_ecdsa|_rsa|_ed25519|_ed5|_ecdsa|~/keys/)'
READ_CMDS = r'(cat|head|tail|less|more)\\s+\\S*' + SECRET_PATS
ECHO_CMDS = r'(echo|printf)\\s+.*' + SECRET_PATS
if re.search(READ_CMDS, cleaned, re.I) or re.search(ECHO_CMDS, cleaned, re.I):
    print('BLOCKED: Command would expose secret/key material to LLM context. Load into env var silently instead: export VAR=\$(cat file 2>/dev/null)', file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(2)
INLINE_EXP = r'\\\$\\(cat\\s+\\S*' + SECRET_PATS + r'.*?\\)'
if re.search(INLINE_EXP, cleaned, re.I) and not re.match(r'^\\s*export\\s', cleaned):
    print('BLOCKED: Shell expansion of secret file without export. Use: export VAR=\$(cat file 2>/dev/null) then reference \$VAR', file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(2)
"

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); inp=d.get(\"tool_input\",{}); print(inp.get(\"file_path\",inp.get(\"new_string\",\"\")[:40]))"); echo "$(date -u +\"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ\") MODIFIED: $FILE" >> .claude/session-changes.log'

bash -c 'echo "
--- Session Context ---"; echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo detached)"; echo "Last commit: $(git log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null || echo none)"; echo "
Reminder: Check specs/<feature>/tasks.md for current progress."; echo "SDLC phases: see docs/sdlc.md"; echo "---
"'

bash -c 'echo "
--- Session ended ---
Reminders:
- Update specs/<feature>/tasks.md with progress
- Run /memory update if this session produced non-obvious decisions
- If you made architectural decisions, create an ADR in docs/adr/
- Ensure commit messages use conventional prefixes (feat:, fix:, etc.)
" >&2'
